tools.name: create_widget_blueprint
tools.description:
Create a new UMG Widget Blueprint asset (WBP_) with an optional root widget class.

Widget Blueprints have TWO systems (analogous to Blueprint actors):
  1. Widget Tree: Visual hierarchy of UWidget objects (CanvasPanel, TextBlock, Button, etc.)
     — managed via add_widget and set_widget_property
  2. Widget Blueprint Graph: Standard K2 Blueprint logic (OnClicked bindings, variable set/get)
     — populated via inject_blueprint_nodes_t3d with asset_path pointing to the WBP

Naming convention: WBP_ prefix (e.g. WBP_HealthBar, WBP_MainMenu, WBP_Settings)

Workflow:
1. create_widget_blueprint — create the asset
2. add_widget — build the widget hierarchy
3. set_widget_property — set text, colors, visibility
4. compile_widget_blueprint — verify no errors
5. inject_blueprint_nodes_t3d — wire click/hover events in the graph

asset_path.description: Content path for the Widget Blueprint, e.g. /Game/UI/WBP_MainMenu

root_widget_class.description: Class for the root container widget. Default: CanvasPanel. Options: CanvasPanel, VerticalBox, HorizontalBox, SizeBox, Overlay, GridPanel, ScrollBox. Use CanvasPanel for freely positioned UI; VerticalBox/HorizontalBox for auto-layout.

tools.name: add_widget
tools.description:
Add a UMG widget to the widget tree of an existing Widget Blueprint.

The parent_widget MUST be a panel widget (a container that accepts children):
  Panel widgets: CanvasPanel, VerticalBox, HorizontalBox, GridPanel, ScrollBox, Overlay, WidgetSwitcher, SizeBox
  Leaf widgets (cannot be parents): TextBlock, Button (well, Button contains one child slot), Image, ProgressBar, Slider, CheckBox, EditableTextBox

Call get_widget_tree FIRST to see current widget names and which are panels.

Leaf widget classes:
  TextBlock — display text
  Image — display a texture/material
  Button — clickable; contains one child slot
  ProgressBar — fill-based value display
  Slider — draggable numeric value
  CheckBox — boolean toggle
  EditableTextBox — user text input
  RichTextBlock — styled text with markup

Panel widget classes:
  CanvasPanel — absolute positioning with anchors
  VerticalBox — vertical auto-stack
  HorizontalBox — horizontal auto-stack
  GridPanel — grid layout
  ScrollBox — scrollable container
  Overlay — z-stacked layers
  WidgetSwitcher — tab-style visibility switcher
  SizeBox — enforces min/max size on child

asset_path.description: Content path of the Widget Blueprint to modify

widget_class.description: Widget class to add. Leaf: TextBlock, Image, Button, ProgressBar, Slider, CheckBox, EditableTextBox. Panel: CanvasPanel, VerticalBox, HorizontalBox, ScrollBox, GridPanel, Overlay, WidgetSwitcher, SizeBox.

widget_name.description: Unique name for the widget in the tree, e.g. TitleText, HealthBar, SubmitButton. Used to reference this widget in set_widget_property.

parent_widget.description: Name of the parent panel widget to add this widget to. Must be a panel widget (CanvasPanel, VerticalBox, etc.). Use get_widget_tree to find panel widget names. If omitted, attaches to root panel.

tools.name: set_widget_property
tools.description:
Set a property on a named widget inside a Widget Blueprint.

Property names are exact C++ property names (case-sensitive). Common properties by widget type:

TextBlock:
  Text — the displayed string (FText format: use NSLOCTEXT or plain string)
  ColorAndOpacity — text color (FLinearColor: "(R=1.0,G=0.0,B=0.0,A=1.0)" for red)
  Font — font settings
  Justification — 0=Left, 1=Center, 2=Right

Button:
  BackgroundColor — button tint color
  bIsFocusable — whether keyboard focus is allowed

Image:
  ColorAndOpacity — tint

ProgressBar:
  Percent — 0.0 to 1.0 fill value
  FillColorAndOpacity — bar color

Slider:
  Value — 0.0 to 1.0
  MinValue, MaxValue — range

CheckBox:
  bIsChecked — initial checked state

Any widget:
  Visibility — 0=Visible, 1=Collapsed, 2=Hidden
  bIsEnabled — whether the widget accepts input
  ToolTipText — hover tooltip
  RenderOpacity — 0.0=transparent to 1.0=opaque

asset_path.description: Content path of the Widget Blueprint

widget_name.description: Exact name of the target widget (as shown in get_widget_tree)

property_name.description: Exact C++ property name. Examples: Text, ColorAndOpacity, Visibility, Percent, bIsEnabled, BackgroundColor, Justification

property_value.description: String-serialized value. Examples: 'Hello World' for text, '(R=1.0,G=0.5,B=0.0,A=1.0)' for color, '0' for Visible, '1' for Collapsed, 'true' or 'false' for booleans, '0.75' for floats

tools.name: get_widget_tree
tools.description:
Read-only query: return the full widget hierarchy of a Widget Blueprint as JSON.

Returns a list of all widgets with:
  - name: exact widget name (use this for add_widget parent_widget and set_widget_property widget_name)
  - class: widget class (tells you if it's a panel/container)
  - is_root: whether this is the root widget
  - is_panel: true = can be used as parent_widget in add_widget
  - child_count: number of direct children (for panels)

Call this BEFORE add_widget or set_widget_property to know exact widget names.

asset_path.description: Content path of the Widget Blueprint to inspect

tools.name: compile_widget_blueprint
tools.description:
Compile a Widget Blueprint and return all errors and warnings.

Widget Blueprints use the same compiler as regular Blueprint actors. Call after building the widget tree and wiring graph logic to verify correctness.

asset_path.description: Content path of the Widget Blueprint to compile
